content.full_text:
January 17, 1991

Scott Halabrin
General Counsel
FPPC
428 "J" Street, Suite 300
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Scott:

I have been advised by the Deputy City Clerk of the City of Irwindale that I must file an SEI because I earned $1,000 last year as special counsel on a small piece of litigation. Would you please be kind enough to send me a copy of the City of Irwindale's Conflict of Interest Code, and also your opinion, formal or informal, of whether a special counsel on one law suit, working directly under and for the City Attorney, has to file an SEI. Thank you.

Good luck in the coming term!

Very truly yours,

MICHAEL B. MONTGOMERY

MBM/jc
